name: @senomas/proxy-provider
description_en: A [pi-coding-agent](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi-coding-agent) extension that registers a **deepseek** provider via a configurable AI proxy.
description_zh: 一个 [pi-coding-agent](https://github.com/earendil-works/pi-coding-agent) 扩展，通过可配置的 AI 代理注册 **deepseek** 提供者
